excerpt: Community for regenerative living and sacred commerce. Supports Amazon cacao tree planting, DAO governance, and Soul Tribe events. Join to co-create sustainability.
shipment_description: 1-year membership to Stewards of NovaGaia Private Membership Association. Includes access to regenerative initiatives (cacao tree planting, carbon credits), DAO-style Member Assembly, sacred commerce tokens, Soul Tribe gatherings, and educational programs in permaculture and regenerative living. Annual dues: $111, renewable yearly, cancel anytime.

excerpt: Discover 150kg of top-grade, organically grown cacao beans from Vivi's Farm in Jeribucuacu, near the pristine beaches of Bahia, Brazil. Sustainably produced using fish-based fertilizer, these premium beans support regenerative farming and empower local communities through TrueSight DAO’s equitable supply chain.
shipment_description: Agroverse is thrilled to announce a new batch of 150 kilograms of top-grade, organically grown cacao beans sourced from Vivi's Farm in Jeribucuacu, located near the stunning beaches of Bahia, Brazil. This farm employs innovative regenerative agroforestry practices, utilizing fish-based fertilizer to enrich the soil naturally, ensuring sustainable production and high-quality cacao. Through TrueSight DAO’s decentralized platform, this batch is financed via community-driven DeFi investments, guaranteeing fair prices for Vivi’s Farm and fostering environmentally friendly practices. By connecting these premium cacao beans to global markets, Agroverse eliminates middlemen, enhances transparency, and supports small-scale farmers in building a thriving, equitable supply chain. Join our movement to co-create a sustainable future and enjoy the rich, unique flavors of Bahia’s finest cacao.

excerpt: 10 unique Prism Percussions drums in 8", 12", 16", or 20" sizes with laser-etched designs, each with a QR code.
shipment_description:
Prism Percussions, based in Oregon, creates custom wooden drums in 8", 12", 16", and 20" sizes, with 4 or 6-sided designs, each producing distinct tones—deeper with larger sizes. No two drums are alike, featuring unique laser-etched patterns that celebrate artistry and individuality.


Our Impact
In partnership with TrueSight DAO’s Sunmint initiative, Prism Percussions supports Amazonian farmers by funding cacao tree planting through sustainable agroforestry. This exclusive collection of 10 drums, each engraved with a unique QR code, connects you to this mission. Your purchase helps restore degraded rainforest lands, promote biodiversity, and empower indigenous communities with sustainable livelihoods. Scan the QR code to explore your drum’s story and its role in combating climate change.


How It Works

  • Tree Financing: Your drum purchase funds cacao tree planting, supporting farmers in adopting cabruca agroforestry to restore the Amazon ecosystem.

  • Carbon Credit Generation: Sunmint’s program generates carbon credits, sold to US companies, to sustain reforestation efforts and ensure scalability.

  • Celebrating Your Support: As a thank-you, drum buyers receive a bag of high-quality cacao once the trees mature, connecting you directly to the farmers’ success.


Highlights

  • Rainforest Restoration: Supporting reforestation and agroforestry to heal degraded Amazon lands.

  • Sustainable Craftsmanship: Handcrafted drums with unique designs, celebrating art and sustainability.

  • Community Empowerment: Enabling economic opportunities for indigenous Amazonian farmers.

  • Biodiversity Conservation: Promoting ecosystem health through sustainable cacao farming.

  • Climate Impact: Contributing to carbon credit generation to mitigate climate change.

excerpt: In the heart of Bahia's ancient groves, where 70-year-old native cacao trees whisper secrets of the earth, Oscar Fazenda delivers 40kg of Harvest 2025's finest—a creamy elixir of luxurious dark chocolate allure, bridging Brazil's wild heritage with Europe's refined elegance.
shipment_description:
Sourced exclusively from Oscar Fazenda in Brazil's vibrant Bahia region, this 40-kilogram shipment captures the essence of Harvest 2025. Nurtured by trees over 70 years old—venerable guardians of the land—these beans hail from rare native varieties, untouched by modern hybridization. Each pod bursts with a profoundly rich, velvety creaminess, unfolding into a sophisticated taste profile reminiscent of premium European dark chocolate: deep cocoa notes laced with subtle fruit undertones and a lingering, indulgent finish.


Perfect for artisan chocolatiers, craft bean-to-bar makers, or connoisseurs seeking authenticity in the Agroverse, this cacao embodies sustainable luxury—harvested with reverence for the ecosystem that birthed it. Limited availability; trace its journey from Bahia's sun-drenched soil to your creations via Truesight's blockchain transparency. Elevate your palate with a piece of living history.
